steps.title: Use the invisibility clue
steps.content: The water is described as so clear that it was almost invisible, and the people on the boat seem to float in air above plants and fish. That means clear refers to being able to see through the water.

steps.title: Reject abstract meanings
steps.content: A means simple, B means understandable, and C means obvious. Those meanings do not explain why the water seems invisible or why the underwater scene is visible. The remaining choice describes something see-through. The answer is D.
